reviews.review_description:
I never bought this game because of the reviews and the low ratings on the store but a few days ago I decided to buy the game because was only like 4 euro and oh boy what a gem ! The game is far superior that most people talk about,  almost my first impression after 2 hours kinda 

I own pretty much all the greatest games on the store ( 150 ish)  and i played another 150 /200  so I'm not a beginner 

I believe i also figured out why people don't like this game 

1. The game is hard , not for beginners or kids 

2. The game has nothing to do with superhot and I own all the superhot like games ( action hero,  chronlstrike , presentiment of death , vendetta ) 

The only thing similar is the style of the graphics,  kinda similar with superhot 

Practically is The Flash Game , when you move you will move in almost a slow mo type of movement and the enemy's also in this type of slow mo but only a little slower than you , but they never stop like in the super hot games 

When you stop moving the enemy's moves at normal speed 

Practically is very challenging to track all the bullets /enemy's when you are moving , your brain is overwhelmed but it is also fun because it feels more like real life situation,  very impredictable and dangerous 

So dont trust all the haters , cold Vr is a fantastic game if you know what it is really about! 
You will feel like in the matrix or The flash ! The only difference is the flash move at very high speed and everything almost stops , in cold vr nothing stop they only slow down like in a slo mo action movie 

The graphics is great , a lot of levels like 40/50 , very cool game  that was misunderstood by the average Joe's people on the internet , so if you like the idea of this game and you never have the courage to buy the game , trust me the game is great ! Very addictive and fun to play ! 

Keep in mind that is  a hard game , but besides that is a very underrated game !

reviews.review_title: It is amazing but my eyes are a bit mhe
reviews.review_description: So it is amazing and cool so I give a 4⭐ no 5⭐ because of my eyes so amazing but if you have sensitive eyes then don't recommend

Glitchy
bad physics 
Terrible game play
bad movement physics 
main mechanic barely works
in short this is a half put together superhot clone that lost the plot, then ran its own foot over by trying to out do the original and failing

From what I understand this is the same dev that made superhot. Cold VR is 1/5. It's absolutely early access or unfinished. 

The actual gameplay is uninteresting. Time slows down when you move with the joystick. Time speeds up when you stop moving. It's simple, but it's also not fun. Graphics and sound effects are flat. The movement feels slow and sluggish. The environment is low quality. I had much higher expectations from superhot dev.
This game is so Awesome!!!  Super Fun!!!  Really Love the Cyber Punk Feel!  Great Job!!!

When I started the game up I felt like I should’ve listened to the reviews… I wasted my money on a half baked game that doesn’t look done I see what they were going for but I don’t really like it… I WANT MY MONEY BACK

I'm not sure if it's just me, but the game is glitchy, the sound quality is bad, and the graphics are unpleasant.  Environment looks like Counter-Strike. There was hype about this game, but I'm honestly disappointed. Maybe on PC VR it is amazing, but the Meta Quest version is not so good.

The game has its concept there, time slows when you move, but it just feels... half baked in a sense. 
There's barely any satisfaction for killing enemies as it just plays a low quality SFX and just shatters them, also the lack of being able to pick up weapons off enemies is kind of a let down as you are basically just using what you started with and if you run out of ammo, that's all you get... of course it doesn't matter because the levels are pretty short. 
The level to level transitions take too long which can kill the vibe when the octane is high, there's not much intensity in this game as I wish it could've had. 
Overall, I feel like this game didn't have enough time put into it for it to recieve a full launch, I see the potential for sure, I just don't feel satisfied due to the absolute lack of interesting things that happen, it feels like a more boring Matrix or SUPERHOT due to its lack of flow. 
In the game's current state, if it even has a future, it is not worth $19.99, it could be better. I truly hope this game gets a big update fixing the issues that it has alongside maybe some Quality Of Life changes like graphical upgrades, or at least more animations on the blue guys when you defeat them, so much could be improved for this game to be actually good and worth playing.

I hate the comparison to Superhot because this game should be recognized on its own but I understand because there are not many games in the genre. It's basically like Superhot in reverse. Time slows when you move and resumes when you stand still so the premise is to always stay moving. The gameplay is extremely fun and frantic, good story and well acted cutscenes. Felt like I was in a hacker movie. The developer is a super nice guy and active in the community asking what he can do to make the game better and even asking the community for ideas on new stages. Love this game and will definitely recommend it to anyone who likes games in this genre!

I was so hyped about this game then I played and it is terrible. Glitchy any time you get to close to anything a wall whatever the screen goes black. I wish I never wasted my time on this. It sucks that bad. Graphics suck gameplay sucks. The story is basically the matrix movie. Soooooo disappointed . Complete waste of time and money. I tried to keep playing to see what was supposed to be so great about it but it's terrible. Definitely getting a refund. Should of been a free game honestly. I thought this was supposed to be like super hot. Not even close I'll wait for super hot 2. This game is awful

It has definitely some minor flaws, but once you are into the challenge (and it's really hard in times) it's hard to stop. There are many ways of solving the levels (sometimes it's little chaotic, but always fun). It's really good that the restarting level works quickly, so another try is so tempting.

I hope the game will get more levels and Quest 3 update (more shiny surfaces and black screen when close to walls fixed).

Otherwise it's great. 

Please follow me for referral.
The way you can play through the levels and everything is amazing, i'm already practicing tricks and you can see it's the work of love and passion too. Just an amazing experience!!!

Wonderfully frantic and fun! 
I love this game!
